prestazioni: Engine: 5.7L HEMI V8 (EZB engine code) with a forged rotating assembly from Manley Performance, including forged crankshaft (PN: 16200), H-beam connecting rods (PN: 14175), and forged pistons (PN: 55150) with a 10.5:1 compression ratio for E85 compatibility. Paired with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (PN: 273H-14) with 236°/242° duration and 0.607"/0.617" lift on a 114° LSA for aggressive mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Hellcat supercharger upgrade via a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger kit (PN: 02-0650-0S) with a custom billet aluminum pulley (3.5" diameter) and supporting fuel system upgrades, including dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pumps (PN: F90000267) and Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (PN: ID1050xDS). Intercooler system upgraded to a Mishimoto liquid-to-air intercooler (PN: MMINT-CHAR-15) with a 30% larger core and integrated water reservoir.

Drivetrain & Handling: Quaife ATB helical LSD (PN: QDF7Z) for the 8.25" rear differential, paired with a Getrag TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission swap (from the Challenger SRT8) with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch (PN: 8617) and billet flywheel (PN: 9617). Suspension overhaul with KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (PN: 35221001) with 8-position rebound and 12-position compression damping, along with Hotchkis Sport Suspension sway bars (PN: 22112 for front, 22113 for rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (PN: 9.5161G).
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (PN: RB-CHRG-03) with extended carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (PN: 1080-M227) and exposed carbon fiber accents on the hood and trunk.

Aerodynamics: APR Performance GTC-300 adjustable carbon fiber rear wing (PN: CF-1000) with 300mm chord and 3-position angle adjustment, mounted on custom aluminum pedestals. Front bumper replaced with an Anderson Composites carbon fiber front lip (PN: AC-CHRG-FL) and side skirts (PN: AC-CHRG-SS) for reduced drag and improved downforce.

Wheels & Stance: Forged BBS LM-R wheels (PN: LM-R 9.5x20 ET15 front, 11x20 ET25 rear) in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear). Fender gap minimized with custom wheel spacers from H&R (PN: 54656-02 for front, 54656-04 for rear) and aggressive -3° front camber via SPC adjustable camber plates (PN: 81260).
